content:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="ko">
<script type="text/javascript">
	var d = new Date();
	var year = d.getFullYear();
	var month = d.getMonth() + 1;
	var day = d.getDate();
	var hour = d.getHours();

	if ((d.getMonth()+1) < 10) month = "0" + month;

	if (day < 10) day = "0" + day;

	if (hour < 10) hour = "0" + hour;
	
	var today = "" + year + month + day + hour;
	
	if (today >= "2021102420" && today < "2021102709") {
		document.location.href="/system_notice/systemNotice.html";
	}else{
		document.location.href="/seoulMain.do";
	}
</script>
<body>
</body>
</html>
